description: Brazilian criminal organization originating in Rio de Janeiro, founded in 1998 by former Comando Vermelho members including Celso Luís Rodrigues and Ernaldo Pinto de Medeiros. Initially allied with Terceiro Comando, it later split and gained control of the Rocinha favela. Engaged in drug trafficking and assassinations, it remains active and rivals Comando Vermelho and Terceiro Comando Puro.
